name: Inter Gamma Investment Company Ltd
summary: Inter-Gamma Investment Company Ltd., through its subsidiaries, operates in the fuel management and fuel stations infrastructure, public transportation payment systems, imaging, and real-estate sectors worldwide. It operates through three divisions: Technologies, Real Estate, and Imaging. The Technologies division develops, manufactures, and markets automated car refueling, automated fuel stations management, and car fleets management systems, including automation, c-store, RFID vehicle identification, and fuel and fleet management systems for retail gas stations and commercial fleets, as well as on board management systems for public transportation. The Real Estate division owns and operates office spaces and service areas in industrial zones. The Imaging division distributes consumer imaging, professional imaging, and raw materials for electronic imaging equipment, as well as consumables. Inter-Gamma Investment Company Ltd. was founded in 1965 and is based in Herzliya, Israel.
